mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, balance, updated_at FROM point ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, point_id, order_id, type, amount, balance_after, created_at FROM point_history WHERE point_id = #{pointId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history (point_id, order_id, type, amount, balance_after) VALUES (#{pointId}, #{orderId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM point_history WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND type = 'USE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM point WHERE 1=1
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
